metric_estimands.source_equal_weighted: each source contributes total weight one within each target
metric_estimands.aria_equal_weighted: each held aria contributes total weight one within each target
metric_estimands.aria_fold_mean_global_class: metric calculated per aria with all dataset classes, then averaged
metric_estimands.aria_fold_mean_present_class: UAR calculated over classes observed in each aria, then averaged

limitations: Source-equal weighting is a sensitivity estimand, not a replacement for pooled metrics.
Permutation logs record movable and singleton rows but not realized row assignments; fixed-point fractions are therefore reported as uniform-permutation expectations, not observed values.
Prior-distance correlations are exploratory across 42 target-aria cells.
